figures.description: Three-panel stacked summary of the cosine fit and cross-schedule predictions.
figures.data_setting: Fit on M:100M_gpt_D:20B_scheduler:cosine_rope; predict on WSD and 8-1-1.
figures.key_results: Cosine Log-space R2 = 0.905891; WSD MAPE = 1.560%; 8-1-1 MAPE = 1.599%.

figures.description: 2x2 residual comparison for early and late residual patterns across schedules.
figures.data_setting: Early/late residual comparison on Tissue baseline and the normalized-progress correction across cosine, WSD, and 8-1-1.
figures.key_results: The improved method lowers early-step residual magnitude and early MAE across schedules.
figures.parameters: Built from saved residuals.csv artifacts: tissue_baseline/2026-05-31_183420 and tissue_improved/2026-05-31_225220.

figures.description: Standalone Multi-Power Law reproduction with 7 fitted parameters and cross-schedule prediction.
figures.data_setting: Train on cosine curve from the course pkl file; report WSD prediction and 8-1-1 extension.
figures.key_results: Train avg log-space R² = 0.824753; Test avg log-space R² = 0.805011; Cosine log-space R² = 0.824753; WSD log-space R² = 0.804552; 811 log-space R² = 0.805471.

notes: This script now fits the full 7-parameter Multi-Power Law model.
The script reads the course-provided gpt_loss+lrs.pkl file directly.
Dense pkl curves are sampled at a fixed stride to match the sparse-checkpoint setting used by the MPL reproduction.
The summary page is regenerated automatically from figure_registry.json.
